query:
SELECT section, entity, status, started_at, finished_at, row_count, error_message 
FROM sync_logs 
ORDER BY started_at DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
SELECT section, entity, status, started_at, finished_at, row_count, error_message 
FROM sync_logs 
ORDER BY started_at DESC 
LIMIT 10;

rows.error_message: Auto-cleared on startup: previous Cloud Run instance was killed during sync
